title: Pronouncing Adjectives and Existent Locations
learningGoal: The learner will correctly pronounce long descriptive phrases, focusing on the negative conjugations of i-adjectives and complex positional phrases.
instructions: Month 2 pronunciation gets harder. You will be tested on dropping the 'i' for negative adjectives, and stringing together multi-part location sentences. Listen closely to the rhythm of the native speaker.

contentItems.text: When making an i-adjective negative (e.g. Takaku arimasen), make sure the 'ku' is pronounced clearly.

targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Swallowing the double 'i' sound at the end of oishii.
Saying 'Oishiiku arimasen' (forgetting to drop the final i before adding ku).

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: きれいじゃありません
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'Kireiku arimasen'. It is a na-adjective exception.
Saying 'Neko wa imasu'. When introducing new existence, use 'ga'.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: きの したに います
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Pronouncing 'shita' heavily. The 'i' in shita often gets devoiced (sh'ta).

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: はこの なかに あります
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'Hako naka' and forgetting the 'no' particle that links the two nouns.

expectedPronunciationText: おいしいです おいしくありません きれいなひと きれいじゃありません ねこがいます つくえのうえ きのしたにいます はこのなかにあります

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic! You successfully navigated complex adjective conjugations and positional phrases.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! Focus heavily on 'Oishiku arimasen' and 'Kirei ja arimasen'. Don't mix up the negative rules.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Try to speak the positional phrases (Hako no naka ni) as one continuous thought without pausing at the particles.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: おいしいです おいしくありません きれいなひと きれいじゃありません ねこがいます つくえのうえ きのしたにいます はこのなかにあります
acceptedVariants: おいしいです おいしく ありません きれいな ひと きれいじゃ ありません ねこが います つくえの うえ きの したに います はこの なかに あります
adminCorrectAnswerSet.syllableSplitReference: o-i-shi-i-de-su o-i-shi-ku-a-ri-ma-se-n ki-re-i-na-hi-to ki-re-i-ja-a-ri-ma-se-n ne-ko-ga-i-ma-su tsu-ku-e-no-u-e ki-no-shi-ta-ni-i-ma-su ha-ko-no-na-ka-ni-a-ri-ma-su
adminCorrectAnswerSet.phoneticApproximation: oishiidesu oishikuarimasen kireinahito kireijaarimasen nekogaimasu tsukueno ue kinoshitani imasu hakononakani arimasu
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: おいしいです おいしくありません きれいなひと きれいじゃありません ねこがいます つくえのうえ きのしたにいます はこのなかにあります
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: Oishii desu Oishiku arimasen Kirei na hito Kirei ja arimasen Neko ga imasu Tsukue no ue Ki no shita ni imasu Hako no naka ni arimasu

audioAssets.audioTranscript: おいしいです。おいしくありません。きれいな ひと。きれいじゃありません。ねこが います。つくえの うえ。きの したに います。はこの なかに あります。

hintText: Rhythm is key. 'Hako no naka ni arimasu' flows together in a steady 1-2-3 beat.
commonMistakes: Saying 'Kireiku arimasen'. The speech engine will mark this wrong. It must be 'Kirei ja arimasen'.
